name: Fat-Free Apple Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch round baking pan with cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a medium bowl, mix sugar and skim milk thoroughly using a wire whisk or fork.
4. Whisk egg whites and corn syrup into the sugar mixture.
5. Gradually stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Arrange apples over the top, overlapping to cover.
8. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
